mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_USER (USER_ID, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, EMAIL, PASSWORD, USER_ROLE) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{password}, 'USER')
mapper.select:
SELECT USER_SEQ, USER_ID, USER_NAME, NICKNAME, EMAIL, USER_ROLE, DATE_FORMAT(CREATED_AT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS CREATED_AT FROM TB_USER
AND (USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR USER_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY USER_SEQ DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_USER SET USER_ROLE = #{userRole} WHERE USER_SEQ = #{userSeq}
